sections.paragraph:
Original: תּבל תּוּבל

Transliteration: tûbal tûbal

Phonetic: too-bal'

BDB Definition:

Tubal = "thou shall be brought"
  1. son of Japheth and grandson of Noah (noun proper masculine)
  2. a region in east Asia Minor (noun proper territory)
    1. perhaps nearly equal to Cappadocia

Origin: probably of foreign derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
